name: Heian Ceremony Service Co.,Ltd.
summary: Heian Ceremony Service Co.,Ltd. provides wedding and funeral services in Japan. It offers wedding and various kinds of banquets, wedding and general beauty, photo studios, costume rentals, wedding venue information, various events, honeymoon consultation, gift sales, catering dishes, restaurants, business trip parties, various commemorative ceremonies contract, funeral set contract, legal affairs, fresh flowers, garlands, printing, Buddhist altars, halls rental, graveyards, and gravestone arrangements and consultants services. In addition, the company operates four home care sales offices; 6 group homes; 3 day services; and 2 elderly rental apartments in Hiratsuka, Fujisawa, Chigasaki, and Odawara. Further, it manages and operates mutual aid associations and arranges subscribers for ceremonial occasions; and engages in cooking, funeral gifts, invitations, photographs of deceased people, as well as develops private brand products. The company was founded in 1969 and is based in Hiratsuka, Japan.
